subcodes.first_line: O handmaidens of the All-Merciful and leaves of the Tree of Divine knowledge! Give thanks unto Him Who is the Intended One, that in this wondrous Dispensation, in such wise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اماء رحمن و ورقات سدره عرفان شکر کنید حضرت مقصود را که در کور بدیع بوجهی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for women
